extension.description: Watch live TV channels from the Flexi TV streaming service. Browse channels by category and play HLS streams directly in Kodi via InputStream Adaptive. Requires a valid Flexi TV subscription.

Sledujte živé televízne kanály zo streamovacej služby Flexi TV. Prehľadávajte kanály podľa kategórií a prehrávajte HLS streamy priamo v Kodi cez InputStream Adaptive. Vyžaduje platné predplatné Flexi TV.
extension.disclaimer: This addon requires valid Flexi TV subscription credentials. You must configure your username and password in the addon settings.
